metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Coaches, drafts, polishes, and audits Chinese documents based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然). v7.0 两世界拆分: per-use 改稿走 clean-context writing-reviewer 子代理返回自然语言反馈 + 粗判 (够好了/要改/红线未清), 数值逐维评分下沉 evals/offline-harness/ 离线 dev-eval. 审查四焦点: 立意 / 结构与论据 / 材料·事实 / AI味·标点. Modes: coach / polish / audit. Strictly enforces GB/T 15834 curly quotes, blocks 公文黑词 (赋能/重塑/闭环/抓手), 元注释 (作为一个 AI 助手), 戏剧化叙事 (三层防御/跑通/翻车). Genres: 公文/讲话稿/调研/述职/汇报/随笔杂文/自媒体/咨询.
